creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194426
p5-Net-SSH2-0.69.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net/p5-Net-SSH2 to 0.69 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Net-SSH2

Changes to the port:
- added CFLAGS to pass build phase
- added EXAMPLES option with the appropriate variables
- updated and sorted pkg-plist

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
